translationText: When there comes God's victory, and conquest.

arabicText: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًۭا
translationText: And you see the people entering God's religion in multitudes.

arabicText: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
translationText: Then celebrate the praise of your Lord, and seek His forgiveness. He is the Accepter of Repentance.
